mechanics.excerpt: Name Come Up with name for your character; or else other char- acters will have to call him ney you_ In the BattleTech uni- verse , names are more less the same as they are today: Jou need inspiration baby-name book or the ever-popular phone-book trick: Grab your local phone book, flip through quickly and put your finger on random name_ If the first or Iast name looks good_ take it, then flip again for the other name; starting Clan character does not nave last name because he has (presumably) not yet earned Bloodname Phyelcal Description What does your character look Iike?
